title: which came first? fear, harm/evil , or pain? does Genesis 3 tell us?
body:
1. first evil /harm came through the serpents actions words, before man or woman even responded.
2. then fear came through taking in the LIE and submitting to the arrangement of words, theming them faithful, entering into agreement with them. but did pain preceed fear? was there first pain that God excluded Adam and Eve from his ontology? and then did the fear follow? or did the fear itself constitute as pain when the harmful arrangement of words was believed and deemed faithful, when the harmful arrangement of words was entered into agreement with?

[wrong] coveting requires fear, a lie, and a [misaimed/misplaced ] craving
